DISPLAY.TITLE: Display
DISPLAY.VIEW_MODE_DOC: Choose what's shown when you tap a time window. 'Both' is convenient when little new music has been added; switch to 'Albums only' or 'Artists only' if you've added a lot at once and want a single, focused list.
DISPLAY.ALBUMS_SORT_DOC: How to order albums within each section. Applies to the Albums section in window views and to the album list inside artist drill-down views.
DISPLAY.ARTISTS_SORT_DOC: How to order artists within the Artists section.

CONNECTION.TITLE: MPD Connection
CONNECTION.MPD_HOST_DOC: Hostname or IP of the MPD server. Use 'localhost' for the local Volumio MPD (default).
CONNECTION.MPD_PORT_DOC: TCP port of the MPD server. Volumio's default is 6600.
CONNECTION.QUERY_TIMEOUT_DOC: Maximum time to wait for MPD to answer a 'find' query before giving up. 10000 ms is a safe default for libraries up to several thousand files.

BROWSE.MPD_UNREACHABLE: MPD not reachable — check the plugin settings.
